mapper.select:
/* TriplePrmtMgmtMapper.getTriplePrmtList */
SELECT A.PRMT_ID AS prmtId , A.PRMT_NM AS prmtNm , A.STRT_DT AS strtDt , A.END_DT AS endDt , A.USG_YN AS usgYn , A.REGST_ID AS regstId , FN_GET_USRNM(A.REGST_ID) AS regstNm , A.REGST_DTTM AS regstDttm , A.RVISN_ID AS rvisnId , FN_GET_USRNM(A.RVISN_ID) AS rvisnNm , A.RVISN_DTTM AS rvisnDttm FROM MSP_TRIPLE_PRMT A WHERE #{searchBaseDate} BETWEEN A.STRT_DT AND A.END_DT
AND UPPER(A.PRMT_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{prmtNm} ) || '%'
AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.REGST_DTTM DESC

/* TriplePrmtMgmtMapper.getTriplePrmtSocList */ SELECT DECODE(B.RATE_CD, NULL, '0', '1') AS rowCheck ,A.RATE_CD AS rateCd ,A.RATE_NM AS rateNm ,A.DATA_TYPE AS dataType ,A.BASE_AMT AS baseAmt FROM MSP_RATE_MST A ,MSP_TRIPLE_PRMT_RATE B WHERE A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD(+) AND A.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND A.PAY_CL_CD = 'PO' AND B.PRMT_ID(+) = #{prmtId} ORDER BY rowCheck DESC, dataType DESC, rateNm

/* TriplePrmtMgmtMapper.getTriplePrmtAddList */ SELECT DECODE(C.SOC, NULL, '0', '1') AS rowCheck , CD_VAL AS vasCd , CD_DSC AS vasNm , NVL(ETC1,'N') AS dupYn ,B.BASE_AMT AS baseAmt FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST A , MSP_RATE_MST B , MSP_TRIPLE_PRMT_ADD C WHERE A.GRP_ID = 'RCP9043' AND A.CD_VAL = B.RATE_CD AND B.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND B.RATE_CD = C.SOC(+) AND C.PRMT_ID(+) = #{prmtId} ORDER BY rowCheck DESC, vasNm
